# KeyboardMusic

## Tags
music, audio, sound, noise, notes, keys, chord, octave, midi, controller, instrument, electric, signal, digital, studio, production, producer, pianist, piano, play, performance, concert

## Categories
multimedia, devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/keyboard-music)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::KeyboardMusic;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        KeyboardMusic { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
